item.doraemon_pocket.bamboo_copter.toolt: Wear it on your head. Hold jump to rise, hold sneak to descend.
item.doraemon_pocket.air_cannon.tooltip: Right-click to fire an air blast that knocks back entities.
item.doraemon_pocket.shock_gun.tooltip: Right-click to stun normal mobs; stunned targets wake up when damaged.
item.doraemon_pocket.dodge_cloak.tooltip: Wear it in the chest slot or hold it for a chance to dodge damage and deflect projectiles.
item.doraemon_pocket.time_cloth.tooltip: Hold it in one hand and a damaged item in the other, then right-click to spend 30 XP repairing it.
item.doraemon_pocket.adaptation_light.to: Keep it in inventory or hand to maintain environmental adaptation.
item.doraemon_pocket.momotaro_dumpling.t: Right-click to throw or feed it. Large targets can be ridden; sneak-right-click to release.
